description_long: This is a modern, dark-colored sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring two loose white cushions and a large, light beige throw draped over the seat and backrest. The sofa has a solid, blocky frame with gently curved armrests on both sides, providing a contemporary look. The legs are short and sturdy, positioned at the corners, and are barely visible beneath the base. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, matte fabric, while the throw adds a soft, textured contrast. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the height of the armrests, and the seat is wide enough to comfortably accommodate two to three people. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern dark sofa with two white cushions and a large beige throw, featuring curved armrests and a smooth, matte finish. The design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front angle view showing the sofa's two white cushions, beige throw draped across the seat and backrest, and both curved armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's armrest profile, the thickness of the throw, and the arrangement of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the way the throw partially covers the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest, the throw's drape, and the placement of the cushions from a different angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, square white cushions placed at each end of the sofa; no visible seat cushions, as the throw covers the seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, medium height, gently curved with a blocky profile, matching the sofa's main upholstery and lacking decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs located at each corner, dark in color, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, matching the armrests in height and style, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a smooth, matte finish; the throw blanket is light beige with a subtle, soft texture and no visible pattern.
